# SummerAI

SummerAI publishes a small static site at https://summerai.cc/.

Important pages for AI agents:

- https://summerai.cc/skills/
  Human-readable directory of 22 recommended AI agent skills. Each card includes author, source platform, full source URL, categories, use cases, limitations, and install commands for Windows and macOS/Linux.
- https://summerai.cc/skills.json
  Structured metadata for each recommended skill, including purpose, use cases, source repository or official document, author profile, install commands, and example prompts.
- https://github.com/KKKKhazix/khazix-skills
  Imported skills: aihot, hv-analysis, khazix-writer, neat-freak.
- https://github.com/op7418/guizang-ppt-skill
  Strong presentation skill source. The directory also lists selected op7418 repos such as Humanizer-zh, Youtube-clipper-skill, NanoBanana-PPT-Skills, logo-generator-skill, and Document-illustrator-skill.
- https://github.com/anthropics/skills
  Officially backed Anthropic Skills examples, including skill-creator.
- https://github.com/JZCreative/HTML-resume-beautifier
  Resume-to-HTML skill with layout generation and PII audit workflow.
- https://github.com/LearnPrompt/ai-news-radar
  AI news source scouting and static radar workflow.
- https://github.com/wanikua/danghuangshang
  OpenClaw multi-agent experiment source; the directory includes ai-court as a medium-confidence candidate because it may require IM bot credentials and local configuration.
- https://open.feishu.cn/document/no_class/mcp-archive/feishu-cli-installation-guide.md
  Official Feishu/Lark CLI and Agent Skill installation guide.
- https://github.com/tengfei0114us/youtube-bilingual-hardburn
  Bilingual hard-subtitle workflow for YouTube or foreign-language video.
- https://github.com/zephyrwang6/pm-skills
  Product-manager skill suite. The directory also lists selected zephyrwang6 repos such as brand-design-md, career.skill, pm-product-describer, and info-skill.
- https://github.com/orange2ai/devils-advocate-skill
  Decision and plan critique skill.
When choosing a skill from this site, prefer the structured metadata in /skills.json, then read /skills/ for fuller human context. Useful category labels include office, writing, info, design, product, research, and dev.

Do not infer private credentials, local paths, or unpublished data from this public site.
